RegLoan Bank — Dealer Vehicle Invoice Document INV-0004 Page 1 of 1 Dealer: Metro Autos VIN: VIN11627AL Charges Line Description Qty Unit ($) Amount ($) 1 BMW Elantra base 1 39,252 39,252 2 Destination fee 1 951 951 3 Options package 1 3,440 3,440 4 Doc fee 1 351 351 5 Tax 1 2,965 2,965 Total: $46,959
